title: Redis Baseline Config for New Deployment
summary: A small redis.conf baseline with security, persistence, and logging settings for a new Redis deployment.
verification_setup: Create the ACL file referenced by aclfile before startup.
Create the data directory referenced by dir and ensure Redis can write to it.
Create the parent directory of logfile and ensure Redis can write to it.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the Redis 7.4 review checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. Directive names were selected from the official Redis 7.4 redis.conf template, but the fragment still requires environment-specific validation before use.
